paths.name: @/lib/admin
paths.message: requireAdmin only allows FOUNDER+ADMIN regardless of the RBAC matrix in lib/permissions.ts. Use requirePermission(action, resource) + a row-level check from lib/auth/resource-scope.ts. See docs/architecture/adr/0002-rbac-migration-week2.md. (Severity will escalate from warn to error at end of Week 2.)
